zh.lifeSummary: 當John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald於1401年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，他的父親John Carlyle31歲，母親Margaret26歲。他於1420年之前與Janet Kirkpatrick在蘇格蘭結婚。他去世於1463年11月10日在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald于1401年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，他的父亲John Carlyle31岁，母亲Margaret26岁。他于1420年之前与Janet Kirkpatrick在苏格兰结婚。他去世于1463年11月10日在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald was born in 1401, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, John Carlyle, was 31 and his mother, Margaret, was 26. He married Janet Kirkpatrick before 1420, in Scotland. He died on 10 November 1463, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald est né en 1401, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Carlyle, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Janet Kirkpatrick avant 1420, à Écosse. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1463, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald 1401 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carlyle 31 und seine Mutter Margaret 26. Er hat vor 1420 in Scotland Janet Kirkpatrick geheiratet. Er starb am 10. November 1463 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald è nato il nel 1401 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Carlyle, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Janet Kirkpatrick prima del 1420, nel Scotland. Morì il 10 novembre 1463, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldが1401年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父John Carlyleは31歳，母Margaretは26歳であった。1420年以前にスコットランドでJanet Kirkpatrickと結婚した。彼は1463年11月10日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(이)가 1401년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carlyle(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1420년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Janet Kirkpatrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1463년 11월 10일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Torthorwald, Kirkmichael, Dumfries, Scot: Kirkmichael, Dumfreize, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald nasceu em 1401, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Carlyle, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Kirkpatrick antes 1420, em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1463, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald родился в 1401 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Carlyle было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Kirkpatrick перед 1420 г. в местности Шотландия. Он умер 10 ноября 1463 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald nació en 1401, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Carlyle, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Janet Kirkpatrick antes de 1420, en Scotland. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1463, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
